description: Style note Ideal for Sports sessions and for keeping your essentials handy, this puma bag is a durable construction packed with storage space. With a zip flap and front organiser space, this bag has room for all your accessories and stationary. With a large main compartment and adjustable shoulder straps, it's an ideal backpack for school, work, travel and fitness. Product Details Blue bag with a printed flap that has Velcro closures One adjustable shoulder strap and a haul loop A zippered pocket under the flap One main compartment with a padded separator (which has a Velcro closure) Material and Care 100% nylon only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry; do not iron Size Height: 30 cm Width: 44 cm Depth: 8 cm
